scripts.api:types: cargo run -p campus_agora_api --bin export-openapi -- contracts/openapi.json && bun --cwd packages/api-client generate
scripts.api:check: bun run api:types && git diff --exit-code contracts/openapi.json packages/api-client/src/generated.ts
scripts.typecheck: bun --cwd packages/api-client typecheck && bun --cwd apps/web typecheck
scripts.test: bun --cwd packages/api-client test && bun --cwd apps/web test && cargo test --workspace
scripts.build: bun --cwd packages/api-client build && bun --cwd apps/web build
